questions.question: How do I create an account?
questions.answer: Click on the 'Sign Up' button in the top right corner. You can sign up using your email or through your Google account for faster registration.

questions.question: Is it free to use the platform?
questions.answer: Yes, creating an account and browsing professionals is completely free. There's no commission or fees for connecting with professionals.

questions.question: How do I find a professional?
questions.answer: Use our search feature to browse by category, location, or service type. You can also filter by ratings and city to find the right match.

questions.question: Can I offer services on this platform?
questions.answer: Absolutely! If you're a service provider, you can create a professional profile to showcase your services and attract new clients. Go to your profile and click 'Become a Professional'.

questions.question: How do I contact a professional?
questions.answer: Navigate to the professional's profile and click 'Contact'. You'll see their phone number so you can call them directly.

questions.question: How do reviews work?
questions.answer: After completing a service, you can leave a review for the professional. Your honest feedback helps other customers make informed decisions.

questions.question: Can I negotiate pricing with professionals?
questions.answer: Yes, you can discuss pricing directly with professionals by calling them. Many professionals offer custom quotes for specific jobs.

questions.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the service?
questions.answer: Contact the professional first to discuss your concerns. If the issue isn't resolved, you can report it to our support team for assistance.

questions.question: How do I post a job?
questions.answer: go to Jobs and click 'Post a Job' to list available work for professionals.

questions.question: How do I leave a review for a professional?
questions.answer: After working with a professional, go to their profile and click 'Leave a Review'. Rate your experience from 1-5 stars and add comments.

questions.question: How do I become a verified professional?
questions.answer: Complete your profile with all required information, add your services and photos, and submit for verification. Our team will review your profile.

questions.question: Is it free to list my services?
questions.answer: Yes, listing your services is completely free. There's no commission or subscription fees.

questions.question: How do I add the services I offer?
questions.answer: As a professional, you can select service categories from the available list when editing your profile. These help clients find you for specific services.

questions.question: How do clients contact me?
questions.answer: Clients can view your profile and click 'Contact' to see your phone number. You'll see a record of who has viewed your contact information.

questions.question: How do I manage my availability?
questions.answer: Update your profile with your availability information. You can add this in your professional profile settings.

questions.question: Can I offer discounts to attract clients?
questions.answer: Yes! You can discuss special offers directly with clients when they contact you about their needs.

questions.question: How are professionals verified?
questions.answer: We verify identity documents and professional credentials. Look for the 'Verified' badge on profiles.

questions.question: Is my personal information safe?
questions.answer: We use industry-standard security to protect your data. Professionals only see your contact information when you initiate contact.

questions.question: What should I do if I feel unsafe?
questions.answer: If you ever feel threatened or uncomfortable, end communication immediately and report the user. We're committed to maintaining a safe community.

questions.question: How do I update my profile picture?
questions.answer: Go to your profile settings and click on the avatar/photo area to upload a new image.

questions.question: How do I verify my phone number?
questions.answer: Add your phone number in profile settings. It will be masked to other users until you choose to reveal it.

questions.question: How do I become a professional?
questions.answer: Go to your profile settings and click 'Become a Professional'. You'll need to complete your profile with services you offer and set your location.

questions.question: Why can't I log into my account?
questions.answer: Check that you're using the correct email and password. If you forgot your password, use the 'Forgot Password' link to reset it.

questions.question: The page isn't loading properly
questions.answer: Try clearing your browser cache and cookies, then refresh the page. Ensure your browser is updated to the latest version.

questions.question: I'm not receiving email notifications
questions.answer: Check your spam folder and ensure notifications are enabled in your account settings.

questions.question: What data do you collect?
questions.answer: We collect information you provide during registration, profile setup, and platform usage. This includes name, contact details, and service history.

questions.question: How is my data used?
questions.answer: Your data helps us provide and improve our services, match you with appropriate professionals, and communicate important updates.

questions.question: Can I delete my account?
questions.answer: Yes, you can request account deletion from your settings. We'll remove your personal data within 30 days, except where required by law.

questions.question: Do you share my data with third parties?
questions.answer: We only share data with professionals you explicitly contact. We never sell your data to advertisers.

questions.question: How can I contact customer support?
questions.answer: Use the 'Contact & Feedback' button in the footer or email us at support@contacthub.com.

questions.question: I have a suggestion - how can I share it?
questions.answer: We love hearing from our users! Use the feedback form in the footer or email feedback@contacthub.com.
